mapper.select: SELECT a.move_stock_date ,a.seq ,a.src_storage_cd ,a.tar_storage_cd ,s.storage_name AS src_storage_name ,ss.storage_name AS tar_storage_name ,a.manager_id ,m.member_nm AS manager_name ,a.confirmer_id ,c.member_nm AS confirmer_name ,a.move_status ,a.etc ,a.area_cd ,a.move_stock_id ,a.confirm_status ,a.tran_id FROM tb_move_stock_mst a LEFT JOIN tb_users m ON a.manager_id = m.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_users mm ON a.move_manager_id = mm.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_users c ON a.confirmer_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_storage_mst s ON a.src_storage_cd = s.storage_cd LEFT JOIN tb_storage_mst ss ON a.tar_storage_cd = ss.storage_cd WHERE a.move_stock_id = #{moveStockId}

SELECT a.item_type_cd ,a.item_cd ,b.item_name ,a.test_no ,a.qty ,a.move_stock_item_id ,a.move_stock_id FROM tb_move_stock_item a inner join tb_item_mst b on b.item_cd = a.item_cd WHERE a.move_stock_id = #{moveStockId}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_move_stock_mst (move_stock_date, seq, type_cd, area_cd, src_storage_cd, tar_storage_cd, manager_id, move_status, confirm_status, etc, reg_id, upd_id) values (#{moveStockDate}, #{seq}, #{typeCd}, dbo.getStorageByAreaCd(#{srcStorageCd}), #{srcStorageCd}, #{tarStorageCd}, #{managerId}, #{typeCd}, isnull(#{confirmStatus}, 'W'),#{etc}, #{userId}, #{userId})

INSERT INTO tb_move_stock_item ( move_stock_id, item_type_cd, item_cd, test_no, qty, etc, reg_id, upd_id) VALUES (#{moveStockId}, #{itemTypeCd}, #{itemCd}, #{testNo}, #{qty}, #{etc}, #{userId}, #{userId} )
